channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tax cuts and inflation clash as voters assess Trump's economy in midterms
item.description: Republicans want voters to focus on working-class tax cuts when evaluating the economy and the 2025 law Trump calls his big achievement.

item.title: NASA rover captures selfie on Mars
item.description: NASA's Mars rover took a selfie as it approaches the 1,800th day of its mission.

item.title: Iran says it is ready for new US attack as Trump visits China
item.description: Iran's military claims it is trained and ready for any new US assault, as Trump predicts a long talk with China's President Xi in Beijing.

item.title: Gunfire erupts in Philippines Senate where wanted senator is hiding
item.description: Senator Ronald dela Rosa is wanted by the International Criminal Court for his alleged role in the killings of at least 32 people.
